title: AP-Vizag — 92.5% / 7.5% Interim Payment + 2.5% Final Retention
text_english: PAYMENTS and CERTIFICATES: PAYMENTS SHALL be ADJUSTED for RECOVERY of advance payments, LIQUIDATED DAMAGES per tender conditions and SECURITY DEPOSIT for due fulfillment. INTERMEDIATE PAYMENT SHALL be a SUM EQUAL to {{intermediate_payment_pct}}% (default 92.5%) of the value of work done as certified — and BALANCE {{retention_balance_pct}}% (default 7.5%) SHALL be WITHHELD as SECURITY for due fulfillment. ON COMPLETION of entire works, the Contractor SHALL RECEIVE FINAL PAYMENT — except EMD retained as security and a sum equal to {{final_retention_pct}}% (default 2.5%) of total value of work done. The amount withheld from final bill SHALL be RETAINED under DEPOSITS and PAID together with interest after the {{dlp_years}}-YEAR DLP. ADVANCE LOAN REPAYMENT: deduction commences in next interim payment after total payments to contractor reach {{advance_trigger_pct}}% (default 10%) of contract amount AND at rate {{advance_deduction_pct}}% (default 20%) of interim payments — until loan + interest fully repaid prior to completion.
